metadata.title: Who was Max Planck?
metadata.color_semantics: CREAM #F3EBDD ground; INK #2F2A26 text; TEAL #1F4E5F good/true; CRIMSON #E4572E bad/broken; SLATE #29335C structure; GOLD #F3A712 highlight fill only; SAGE #A8C686 human/growth
metadata.greeting_note: German hello — Planck was born in Kiel, Germany. Short form for HAI per schema.
metadata.note: COLD OPEN LAW: B00 = ClaudeComposerAsk. ILLUSTRATE LAW: UI only at B00, B03, B08, B09. ASK→RESULT LAW: B03=ask micro-beat, B04=Manim result. HANDOFF LAW: B08='Your turn.' OUTRO LAW: B09=ClaudeTitleOutro restates title. Pragmatist register: method, when to use, when NOT to, no humanitarian branding outro.
metadata.description_blurb: Max Planck solved a real measurement problem and accidentally broke classical physics. This is what the quantum hypothesis actually is, when it applies, and where the analogy fails.

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file
